docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY MURRAY JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC POST PARTNERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
